summary: Coach Watch weighted relationship state engine verified. Backend /api/coach-watch/{program_id} returns structured output with all 13 features working. Stanford (reply+visit) shows Medium/Increasing/visit state. Creighton (no outreach) shows 'Not started' (NOT 'Low interest'). UCLA (has outreach+reply) shows conversation state. CoachWatchCard displays all required elements. SI drawer CTAs correctly show/hide 'Schedule Follow Up' based on outreach status.
critical_code_review_comments: _compute_coach_watch() function correctly implements 4-bucket weighted scoring: coach engagement (35-50pts), passive engagement (8-25pts), athlete outreach (context only), negative signals (-10 to -18pts)
Interest thresholds correct: 0-24=Low/Not started, 25-49=Emerging, 50-69=Medium, 70+=High (only if coach signal exists)
CoachWatchCard correctly consumes structured backend output - no longer treats athlete actions as coach interest
SchoolIntelligencePanel.classifyEngagement() now uses coachWatch.meta for consistent state
CTA logic correct: No outreach → only 'Send Email'; Has outreach → 'Send Email' + 'Schedule Follow Up'
seed_data_creation: Used existing programs: Stanford (e02f08c6-7c47-430a-aa8d-787a6fbeae00), Creighton (f624f30a-d505-493b-8d5d-4197b970f72f), UCLA (85095202-8b95-4cb2-9390-3275d7840a3d)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Watch relationship state engine complete. Backend endpoint: /api/coach-watch/{program_id}. Key data-testid selectors: coach-watch-card, cw-interest-level, cw-trend, cw-summary, cw-action, cw-signal-{n}, cw-score. SI drawer CTAs: si-primary-cta, si-secondary-cta. CTA visibility depends on coachWatch.meta.hasOutreach. Console CORS error for external images is expected and not blocking.

key_assertions: Stanford: interestLevel=Medium, trend=Increasing, state=visit, score=64, signals=[coach_reply, visit_invite]
Creighton: interestLevel=Not started (NOT Low interest), trend=Not started, state=pre_outreach, score=0, signals=[]
All schools: Structured response with score, interestLevel, trend, state, summary, recommendedAction, primaryCta, secondaryCta, signals[], meta{}

stanford_tests: Signals show coach_reply and visit_invite with points ✅
SI drawer CTAs: 'Send Email' + 'Schedule Follow Up' ✅
creighton_tests: SI drawer CTA: Only 'Send Email' (no 'Schedule Follow Up') ✅
ucla_tests: Summary: 'The coach replied. You have an active conversation.' ✅
SI drawer CTAs: 'Send Email' + 'Schedule Follow Up' ✅
frontend_playwright_tests.console_errors: Only CORS error for external image (expected, not blocking)

verified_requirements.No console errors on journey pages: ✅ PASS (only expected CORS error for external images)
